headline: SWE @Microsoft | Ex-Cisco | Specialist @Codeforces | Knight @Leetcode | AI • Tech • Marketing | DSA | System Design | Brand Collaborations
about:
• Software Engineer at Microsoft | Ex-Cisco
• Finalist at Code Gladiators'23. 
• Specialist at Codeforces and Knight at Leetcode. 
• Skilled in C++, OOPs, DSA, ML-AI, and system design. 

I like to work in teams, contributing to projects where I can gear up my skills, knowledge and collaborate with developers. During my free time I provide services to guide hustlers for their dream jobs!  

I am open to brand collaborations and some good brainstorming sessions, talks about coding, DSA, AI and development in the new era. 

Ping me to collab on any of these topics. I would really appreciate that. Thanks for connecting!

projects.title: HashImagin
projects.associatedWith: Associated with Jaypee Institute of Information Technology
projects.description:
• Led development of a full-stack responsive website which takes user prompts, generates quality images, stores and manages images in database for community usage. 
• Generated over 36+ unique images with maximized prompt efficiency and reducing collection storage by 5%.
• Established Payment Gateway for successful demo account via Razorpay API.

Key Features:
→ 3D responsive homepage
→ Image generation 
→ Database storage (images and prompt)
→ Community use page
→ Payment Gateway (purchasing generated image)

projects.title: MilitaryMania
projects.description:
• Developed software application to account daily military and war operations, attempting to reducing GTI of India. 
• Currently, India standing at Top 12th position Global Terrorism Index (GTI) with 7.432 of 10 scale. 
• Capable to find 1) Optimal solution (war operations) and 2) Satisfying solution (daily operations).

Concepts used:
→ Divide & Conquer (Sorting and Searching): Based on Terror groups/ District Searching/Sorting. 
→ Greedy Techniques:  Dijkstra (Single source Shortest), Fractional Knapsack, Welsh-Powell Algorithm (Graph-Vertex Coloring Optimal), Chromatic number count. 
→ Backtracking Techniques: Escape Path (Bombing Conditions). 
→ Dynamic Programming: Flyod-Warshall Algorithm (All Pairs shortest path), Minimum Weaponry cost (Wines Problem).

Future Scope: 
• Visualization to demonstrate algorithms more efficiently.
• Significance use with proper GTI and APIs using, mapping systems and geotagged data coordinates, supply dates and medical checkpoints.

receivedRecommendations.description:
I had the pleasure of seeing Aditya grow from a passionate intern to a capable full-time engineer at Cisco. He is talented, energetic, and deeply driven to excel in everything he takes on. His curiosity and proactive attitude stand out, he consistently asks thoughtful questions, seeks clarity, and delivers results with impressive speed and precision.

What truly distinguishes Aditya is his ability to take ownership and drive features end-to-end, aligning with all stakeholders and ensuring successful delivery. He takes accountability seriously and always follows through on his commitments. I also enjoyed our many conversations on diverse topics, his clarity of thought and focus on long-term goals are remarkable. Aditya would be an asset to any organization that values initiative, technical depth, and collaboration.
